OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Liza Siu Mendoza, Esq., of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, Tel. 510.433.2600, appearing for defendant(s) and opposing party.
Dana M. Gilreath Ulise, Esq., of Clinton & Clinton, Tel. 562.216.5000, appearing for defendant NFL via court call.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GABRIELLE NAVARRETTE'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. This demurrer serves no useful purpose. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Matthew Conant, Esq., of Lombardi Loper & Conant LLP, Tel. 510.433.2600, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Geoffrey Becker, Esq., of Becker & Becker, Tel. 925.939.9041, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.
David C. McCuaig, Esq., of Clinton & Clinton, Tel. 562.216.5000, appearing for defendant NFL via court call.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FORTY NINERS, LIMITED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Liberally construed, the first cause of action adequately alleges a claim for breach of contract. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Liza Siu Mendoza, Esq., of Lombardi, Loper & Conant, LLP, Tel. 510.433.2600, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Jaison T. Benjamin, Esq., of Clinton & Clinton, Tel. 562.216.5000, appearing for defendant NFL.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FORTY NINERS, LIMITED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. The opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
